events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Saint Francis Memorial for client 1070. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: renal. Allergies: shellfish. Sodium ceiling 500 mg/meal, carbs 40–70 g/meal. Prefers Vietnamese; dislikes pork. Cooking ability: microwave. 10 meals/week, zone Excelsior.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Tofu and Vegetable Curry with Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Lemongrass Chicken with Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Matched: Fresh Spring Rolls with Chicken
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 420/500 mg ✓, carbs 41 g (target 40–70) ✓, no shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Steamed Rice Rolls with Mushrooms
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 423/500 mg ✓, carbs 46 g (target 40–70) ✓, no shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/500 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 40–70) ✓, no shellfish ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1070 added to route R-EXCE-2 (Excelsior), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1070: 10 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
